title: Parenthood Provisional Housing Scheme (PPHS)
text:
Parenthood Provisional Housing Scheme (PPHS) - SupportGoWhere
Parenthood Provisional Housing Scheme (PPHS)
Share link
Provides temporary housing for families as they await the completion of their new flats.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Rent a flat from HDB while waiting for your uncompleted HDB flat
Subsidised rental rates range between $400 to $1,500 for 2-, 3- or 4-room flats
Eligible households may submit applications online
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

To rent a flat from HDB at a subsidised rate while waiting for your flat to be completed

Rental rates depend on the location and flat type, and can range from $400 to $1,500 per month

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen who is with another Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident in the PPHS household

Booked an uncompleted flat under HDB's sales exercises as a married couple, under the Fiance/Fiancee scheme, or as a divorced or widowed parent with children

All members of the PPHS household must not own an existing HDB flat

Monthly household income of less than or equal to $7,000

How to apply?

You can apply online at the HDB website. PPHS application window will be from the 1st to the 14th of even months (Feb, Apr, Jun, Aug, Oct, Dec).

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Branch Service Line: 6225-5432

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 09 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
